endpoints.name: Talk to Chatbot
endpoints.description: This endpoint can be used to have a conversation about food with the spoonacular chatbot. Use the "Get Conversation Suggests" endpoint to show your user what he or she can say.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY.

endpoints.name: Conversation Suggests
endpoints.description: This endpoint returns suggestions for things the user can say or ask the chatbot.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY.

endpoints.name: Search Custom Foods
endpoints.description: Search custom foods in a user's account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY.

endpoints.name: Detect Food in Text
endpoints.description: Take any text and find all mentions of food contained within it. This task is also called Named Entity Recognition (NER). In this case, the entities are foods. Either dishes, such as pizza or cheeseburger, or ingredients, such as cucumber or almonds.

example-1.value: text=I like to eat delicious tacos. The only thing better is a cheeseburger with cheddar. But then again, pizza with pepperoni, mushrooms, and tomatoes is so good too!

endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY.

endpoints.name: Image Analysis by URL
endpoints.description: Analyze a food image. The API tries to classify the image, guess the nutrition, and find a matching recipes.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY.

endpoints.name: Image Classification by URL
endpoints.description: Classify a food image.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY.

endpoints.name: Autocomplete Ingredient Search
endpoints.description: Autocomplete the entry of an ingredient.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY.

endpoints.name: Compute Glycemic Load
endpoints.description: Retrieve the glycemic index for a list of ingredients and compute the individual and total glycemic load.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY.

endpoints.name: Map Ingredients to Grocery Products
endpoints.description: Map a set of ingredients to products you can buy in the grocery store.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY.

endpoints.name: Ingredient Search
endpoints.description: Search for simple whole foods (e.g. fruits, vegetables, nuts, grains, meat, fish, dairy etc.).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get Ingredient Substitutes
endpoints.description: Search for substitutes for a given ingredient.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY.

endpoints.name: Compute Ingredient Amount
endpoints.description: Compute the amount you need of a certain ingredient for a certain nutritional goal. For example, how much pineapple do you have to eat to get 10 grams of protein?
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get Ingredient Information
endpoints.description: Use an ingredient id to get all available information about an ingredient, such as its image and supermarket aisle.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get Ingredient Substitutes by ID
endpoints.description: Search for substitutes for a given ingredient.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Random Food Joke
endpoints.description: Get a random joke that is related to food. Caution: this is an endpoint for adults!
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY.

endpoints.name: Search Menu Items
endpoints.description: Search over 115,000 menu items from over 800 fast food and chain restaurants. For example, McDonald's Big Mac or Starbucks Mocha.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY.

endpoints.name: Autocomplete Menu Item Search
endpoints.description: Generate suggestions for menu items based on a (partial) query. The matches will be found by looking in the title only.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get Menu Item Information
endpoints.description: Use a menu item id to get all available information about a menu item, such as nutrition.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Menu Item Nutrition Label Widget
endpoints.description: Visualize a menu item's nutritional label information as HTML including CSS.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Menu Item Nutrition Label Image
endpoints.description: Visualize a menu item's nutritional label information as an image.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Menu Item Nutrition by ID Widget
endpoints.description: Visualize a menu item's nutritional information as HTML including CSS.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Menu Item Nutrition by ID Image
endpoints.description: Visualize a menu item's nutritional information as HTML including CSS.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Classify Grocery Product
endpoints.description: This endpoint allows you to match a packaged food to a basic category, e.g. a specific brand of milk to the category milk.

value.title: Kroger Vitamin A & D Reduced Fat 2% Milk

endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY.

endpoints.name: Classify Grocery Product Bulk
endpoints.description: Provide a set of product jsons, get back classified products.

value.title: Kroger Vitamin A & D Reduced Fat 2% Milk

endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY.

endpoints.name: Search Grocery Products
endpoints.description: Search packaged food products, such as frozen pizza or Greek yogurt.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY.

endpoints.name: Autocomplete Product Search
endpoints.description: Generate suggestions for grocery products based on a (partial) query. The matches will be found by looking in the title only.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY.

endpoints.name: Search Grocery Products by UPC
endpoints.description: Get information about a packaged food using its UPC.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY. Replace {{UPC}} with a real upc.

endpoints.name: Get Comparable Products
endpoints.description: Find comparable products to the given one.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY. Replace {{UPC}} with a real upc.

endpoints.name: Get Product Information
endpoints.description: Use a product id to get full information about a product, such as ingredients, nutrition, etc. The nutritional information is per serving.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Product Nutrition Label Widget
endpoints.description: Get a product's nutrition label as an HTML widget.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Product Nutrition Label Image
endpoints.description: Get a product's nutrition label as an image.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Product Nutrition by ID Widget
endpoints.description: Visualize a product's nutritional information as HTML including CSS.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Product Nutrition by ID Image
endpoints.description: Visualize a product's nutritional information as an image.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Search Restaurants
endpoints.description: Search through thousands of restaurants (in North America) by location, cuisine, budget, and more.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY.

endpoints.name: Search All Food
endpoints.description: Search all food content with one call. That includes recipes, grocery products, menu items, simple foods (ingredients), and food videos.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY.

endpoints.name: Search Site Content
endpoints.description: Search spoonacular's site content. You'll be able to find everything that you could also find using the search suggestions on spoonacular.com. This is a suggest API so you can send partial strings as queries.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY.

endpoints.name: Random Food Trivia
endpoints.description: Returns random food trivia.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY.

endpoints.name: Search Food Videos
endpoints.description: Find recipe and other food related videos.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY.

endpoints.name: Wine Description
endpoints.description: Get a simple description of a certain wine, e.g. "malbec", "riesling", or "merlot".
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY.

endpoints.name: Dish Pairing for Wine
endpoints.description: Find a dish that goes well with a given wine.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY.

endpoints.name: Wine Pairing
endpoints.description: Find a wine that goes well with a food. Food can be a dish name ("steak"), an ingredient name ("salmon"), or a cuisine ("italian").
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY.

endpoints.name: Wine Recommendation
endpoints.description: Get a specific wine recommendation (concrete product) for a given wine type, e.g. "merlot".
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY.

endpoints.name: Generate Meal Plan
endpoints.description: Generate a meal plan with three meals per day (breakfast, lunch, and dinner).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY.

endpoints.name: Clear Meal Plan Day
endpoints.description: Delete all planned items from the user's meal plan for a specific day.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY. Replace {{DATE}} with a real date. Replace {{USERNAME}} with a real username.

endpoints.name: Add to Meal Plan
endpoints.description: Add an item to the user's meal plan.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY. Replace {{USERNAME}} with a real username.

endpoints.name: Delete from Meal Plan
endpoints.description: Delete an item from the user's meal plan.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{USERNAME}} with a real username.

endpoints.name: Get Shopping List
endpoints.description: Get the current shopping list for the given user.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY. Replace {{USERNAME}} with a real username.

endpoints.name: Add to Shopping List
endpoints.description: Add an item to the current shopping list of a user.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY. Replace {{USERNAME}} with a real username.

endpoints.name: Delete from Shopping List
endpoints.description: Delete an item from the current shopping list of the user.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{USERNAME}} with a real username.

endpoints.name: Generate Shopping List
endpoints.description: Generate the shopping list for a user from the meal planner in a given time frame.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY. Replace {{START-DATE}} with a real start-date. Replace {{END-DATE}} with a real end-date. Replace {{USERNAME}} with a real username.

endpoints.name: Get Meal Plan Templates
endpoints.description: Get meal plan templates from user or public ones.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY. Replace {{USERNAME}} with a real username.

endpoints.name: Add Meal Plan Template
endpoints.description: Add a meal plan template for a user.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY. Replace {{USERNAME}} with a real username.

endpoints.name: Get Meal Plan Template
endpoints.description: Get information about a meal plan template.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{USERNAME}} with a real username.

endpoints.name: Delete Meal Plan Template
endpoints.description: Delete a meal plan template for a user.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{USERNAME}} with a real username.

endpoints.name: Get Meal Plan Week
endpoints.description: Retrieve a meal planned week for the given user. The username must be a spoonacular user and the hash must the the user's hash that can be found in his/her account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY. Replace {{START-DATE}} with a real start-date. Replace {{USERNAME}} with a real username.

endpoints.name: Analyze Recipe
endpoints.description: This endpoint allows you to send raw recipe information, such as title, servings, and ingredients, to then see what we compute (badges, diets, nutrition, and more). This is useful if you have your own recipe data and want to enrich it with our semantic analysis.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY.

endpoints.name: Analyze Recipe Instructions
endpoints.description: This endpoint allows you to break down instructions into atomic steps. Furthermore, each step will contain the ingredients and equipment required. Additionally, all ingredients and equipment from the recipe's instructions will be extracted independently of the step they're used in.

example-1.value: instructions=Put the garlic in a pan and then add the onion. Add some salt and oregano.

endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY.

endpoints.name: Autocomplete Recipe Search
endpoints.description: Autocomplete a partial input to suggest possible recipe names.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY.

endpoints.name: Search Recipes
endpoints.description: Search through hundreds of thousands of recipes using advanced filtering and ranking. NOTE: This method combines searching by query, by ingredients, and by nutrients into one endpoint.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY.

endpoints.name: Convert Amounts
endpoints.description: Convert amounts like "2 cups of flour to grams".
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY.

endpoints.name: Classify Cuisine
endpoints.description: Classify the recipe's cuisine.

example-1.value: title=Pork roast with green beans&ingredientList=3 oz pork shoulder

endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY.

endpoints.name: Extract Recipe from Website
endpoints.description: This endpoint lets you extract recipe data such as title, ingredients, and instructions from any properly formatted Website.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY.

endpoints.name: Search Recipes by Ingredients
endpoints.description: Ever wondered what recipes you can cook with the ingredients you have in your fridge or pantry? This endpoint lets you find recipes that either maximize the usage of ingredients you have at hand (pre shopping) or minimize the ingredients that you don't currently have (post shopping).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY.

endpoints.name: Search Recipes by Nutrients
endpoints.description: Find a set of recipes that adhere to the given nutritional limits. You may set limits for macronutrients (calories, protein, fat, and carbohydrate) and/or many micronutrients.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY.

endpoints.name: Guess Nutrition by Dish Name
endpoints.description: Estimate the macronutrients of a dish based on its title.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get Recipe Information Bulk
endpoints.description: Get information about multiple recipes at once. This is equivalent to calling the Get Recipe Information endpoint multiple times, but faster.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY.

endpoints.name: Parse Ingredients
endpoints.description: Extract an ingredient from plain text.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY.

endpoints.name: Analyze a Recipe Search Query
endpoints.description: Parse a recipe search query to find out its intention.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY.

endpoints.name: Quick Answer
endpoints.description: Answer a nutrition related natural language question.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get Random Recipes
endpoints.description: Find random (popular) recipes. If you need to filter recipes by diet, nutrition etc. you might want to consider using the complex recipe search endpoint and set the sort request parameter to random.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY.

endpoints.name: Equipment Widget
endpoints.description: Visualize the equipment used to make a recipe.

example-1.value: instructions=Preheat oven. Cut cucumber with a knife and put in a blender.

endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY.

endpoints.name: Ingredients Widget
endpoints.description: Visualize ingredients of a recipe. You can play around with that endpoint!
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY.

endpoints.name: Recipe Nutrition Widget
endpoints.description: Visualize a recipe's nutritional information as HTML including CSS.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY.

endpoints.name: Price Breakdown Widget
endpoints.description: Visualize the price breakdown of a recipe.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY.

endpoints.name: Create Recipe Card
endpoints.description: Generate a recipe card for a recipe.

example-1.value: title=My recipe&ingredients=2 cups of green beans&instructions=cook the beans&readyInMinutes=60&servings=2&mask=ellipseMask&backgroundImage=background1

endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY.

endpoints.name: Recipe Taste Widget
endpoints.description: Visualize a recipe's taste information as HTML including CSS. You can play around with that endpoint!
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get Analyzed Recipe Instructions
endpoints.description: Get an analyzed breakdown of a recipe's instructions. Each step is enriched with the ingredients and equipment required.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Create Recipe Card
endpoints.description: Generate a recipe card for a recipe.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Equipment by ID Widget
endpoints.description: Visualize a recipe's equipment list.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Equipment by ID
endpoints.description: Get a recipe's equipment list.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Equipment by ID Image
endpoints.description: Visualize a recipe's equipment list as an image.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get Recipe Information
endpoints.description: Use a recipe id to get full information about a recipe, such as ingredients, nutrition, diet and allergen information, etc.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Ingredients by ID Widget
endpoints.description: Visualize a recipe's ingredient list.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Ingredients by ID
endpoints.description: Get a recipe's ingredient list.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Ingredients by ID Image
endpoints.description: Visualize a recipe's ingredient list.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Recipe Nutrition Label Widget
endpoints.description: Get a recipe's nutrition label as an HTML widget.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Recipe Nutrition Label Image
endpoints.description: Get a recipe's nutrition label as an image.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Recipe Nutrition by ID Widget
endpoints.description: Visualize a recipe's nutritional information as HTML including CSS.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Nutrition by ID
endpoints.description: Get a recipe's nutrition data.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Recipe Nutrition by ID Image
endpoints.description: Visualize a recipe's nutritional information as an image.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Price Breakdown by ID Widget
endpoints.description: Visualize a recipe's price breakdown.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Price Breakdown by ID
endpoints.description: Get a recipe's price breakdown data.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Price Breakdown by ID Image
endpoints.description: Visualize a recipe's price breakdown.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get Similar Recipes
endpoints.description: Find recipes which are similar to the given one.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Summarize Recipe
endpoints.description: Automatically generate a short description that summarizes key information about the recipe.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Recipe Taste by ID Widget
endpoints.description: Get a recipe's taste. The tastes supported are sweet, salty, sour, bitter, savory, and fatty.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Taste by ID
endpoints.description: Get a recipe's taste. The tastes supported are sweet, salty, sour, bitter, savory, and fatty.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Recipe Taste by ID Image
endpoints.description: Get a recipe's taste as an image. The tastes supported are sweet, salty, sour, bitter, savory, and fatty.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Connect User
endpoints.description: In order to call user-specific endpoints, you need to connect your app's users to spoonacular users.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPOONACULAR_API_KEY}} with your SPOONACULAR API KEY.
